scripts.build: npx vite build && npx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:win: npx vite build && npx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && npx electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: npx vite build && npx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && npx electron-builder --mac --x64 --arm64
scripts.build:linux: npx vite build && npx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && npx electron-builder --linux
